title: Research Visitor Programme
summary: This page is a static listing of academic researchers who have visited the Bank of England through its Research Visitor Programme from 2017 to 2025. It contains no policy announcements, data releases, or analysis relevant to macro catalysts or market structure. The most recent visitor listed is Ester Faia (November 2025) and Julian Di Giovanni (October 2025).
key_points: This is a listing page of research visitors, not a policy document or market-moving release
Listed visitors include academics from institutions such as MIT, Harvard, Columbia, HEC Paris, and Goethe University
Notable recent visitors include Julian Di Giovanni (Federal Reserve Bank of New York / Columbia University, October 2025) and Athanasios Orphanides (MIT Sloan, September 2025)
No policy content, guidance, or analytical findings are presented on this page
why_it_matters: This source has no direct relevance to macro catalysts or market structure. It is an administrative record of the Bank of England's research collaboration outreach, not a source of policy signals, data, or market intelligence.
